nodes.name: Telegram Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives Telegram messages, voice, images, docs, video.

nodes.name: WhatsApp Trigger
nodes.notes: WhatsApp Cloud API inbound webhook (text/voice/image/doc/video).

nodes.name: Email Trigger
nodes.notes: Polls support inbox via IMAP; parses body + attachments.

nodes.name: Webhook API
nodes.notes: Public REST endpoint for programmatic intake.

nodes.name: CRM Events
nodes.notes: Receives CRM lifecycle events (ticket/contact/deal changes).

nodes.name: Normalize Data
nodes.notes: Standardizes Telegram/WhatsApp/Email/Webhook/CRM into one schema.

nodes.name: Detect Content Type
nodes.notes: Routes by detected media type; text falls through to default.

nodes.name: Download Voice
nodes.notes: Fetches voice binary from channel storage.

nodes.name: Speech to Text
nodes.notes: OpenAI Whisper transcription of voice messages.

parameters.jsonBody: {"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "You are an intent-extraction engine. Return JSON: {intent, category, urgency_1_to_5}.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ Transcript: $json.text + context: $json.content }}"}]}

nodes.name: Extract Voice Intent
nodes.notes: Claude extracts intent + category from the transcript.

nodes.name: Download Image
nodes.notes: Fetches image binary.

parameters.jsonBody: {"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 768, "system": "You are a multimodal vision analyst. Describe what the customer image shows relevant to a support context. Return concise findings.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ $json.content + (image attached as mediaUrl) }}"}]}

{"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 2048, "system": "Extract all meaningful text from the provided document page(s). Preserve structure. Return plain text.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ Document reference: $json.mediaUrl ; caption: $json.content }}"}]}

nodes.name: Extract Document Text
nodes.notes: Claude reads the document/PDF and extracts text.

parameters.jsonBody: {"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 768, "system": "Summarize the extracted document for a support agent. Return: short summary, key points, action items.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ $json.text }}"}]}

nodes.name: Analyze Video
nodes.notes: Transcribes attached video audio track for context.

nodes.name: Merge Channels
nodes.notes: Reunifies all media pipelines + plain text into a single stream.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO customers (customer_id, name, phone, email, status, total_orders, last_activity) VALUES ('{{ $json.customerId }}','{{ $json.name }}','{{ $json.phone }}','{{ $json.email }}','active', 0, '{{ $json.receivedAt }}') ON CONFLICT (customer_id) DO UPDATE SET name=EXCLUDED.name, phone=EXCLUDED.phone, email=EXCLUDED.email, last_activity=EXCLUDED.last_activity;
SELECT memory FROM memory WHERE customer_id = '{{ $json.customerId }}' LIMIT 1;
SELECT order_id, order_details, status FROM orders WHERE customer_id = '{{ $json.customerId }}' ORDER BY order_id DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT message_id, content, category, timestamp FROM messages WHERE customer_id = '{{ $json.customerId }}' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50;
SELECT faq, company_policies, product_information FROM knowledge_base WHERE document @@ to_tsquery('{{ $json.content }}') LIMIT 5;

options.systemMessage: You are Orion, an enterprise-grade AI customer support agent. You reason step by step, are context aware, and polite. Use the available tools to look up orders, search the knowledge base, and open tickets. Decide a category from: general, sales, technical, billing, complaints. Always end your reply with a JSON block: {"category":"...","confidence":0.x}.

nodes.name: Claude AI Agent
nodes.notes: Primary reasoning agent. Multi-step, context-aware, tool-using.

nodes.name: Claude Chat Model
nodes.notes: Anthropic Claude language model bound to the agent.

nodes.name: Conversation Memory
nodes.notes: Rolling memory of the last 100 messages per customer.

parameters.name: search_knowledge_base
parameters.description: Search company FAQ, policies and product docs.

nodes.name: Knowledge Base Tool
nodes.notes: Agent tool: semantic KB lookup.

nodes.name: Order Lookup Tool
nodes.notes: Agent tool: retrieve order history.

parameters.name: create_ticket
parameters.description: Create a support ticket in the CRM.

nodes.name: Ticket Tool
nodes.notes: Agent tool: open tickets automatically.

nodes.name: Intelligent Routing
nodes.notes: Routes to one of 5 specialist paths by classified category.

parameters.jsonBody: {"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "You are a domain analyst for General Support. Handle general support: FAQs, account, how-to. Be clear and helpful. Produce a concise root-cause/need analysis as JSON {analysis, category, severity_1_5}.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ $json.content + ' || context: ' + ($json.text||'') }}"}]}

{"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "Classify customer sentiment. Return JSON {sentiment: positive|neutral|negative|very negative, score_1_5, emotion}.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ $json.content + ($json.text||'') }}"}]}

{"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "Write the final customer-facing reply for a General Support case. Tone: professional, empathetic, concise. End with the JSON tag.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ $json.analysis + ' || ' + $json.content }}"}]}

{"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "You are a domain analyst for Sales. Answer sales questions: pricing, plans, demos, ROI, quotes. Produce a concise root-cause/need analysis as JSON {analysis, category, severity_1_5}.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ $json.content + ' || context: ' + ($json.text||'') }}"}]}

{"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "Classify customer sentiment. Return JSON {sentiment: positive|neutral|negative|very negative, score_1_5, emotion}.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ $json.content + ($json.text||'') }}"}]}

{"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "Write the final customer-facing reply for a Sales case. Tone: professional, empathetic, concise. End with the JSON tag.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "{{ $json.analysis + ' || ' + $json.content }}"}]}

{"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "You are a domain analyst for Technical. Diagnose technical issues: bugs, errors, integrations, logs, steps. nodes.name: Merge Path Responses
nodes.notes: Converges the 5 specialist paths.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO memory (customer_id, last_100_messages) VALUES ('{{ $json.customerId }}', '{{ $json.content }}') ON CONFLICT (customer_id) DO UPDATE SET last_100_messages = memory.last_100_messages || E'\n' || EXCLUDED.last_100_messages, updated_at = NOW();

parameters.jsonBody: {"customer_id": "{{ $json.customerId }}", "subject": "{{ $json.analysis }}", "priority": "{{ $json.priority }}", "category": "{{ $json.category }}", "source": "{{ $json.channel }}"}
{"author": "Orion AI", "note": "{{ $json.analysis }} | sentiment={{ $json.sentiment }} | confidence={{ $json.confidence }}"}

parameters.query: SELECT status, amount, currency FROM payments WHERE customer_id = '{{ $json.customerId }}' ORDER BY paid_at DESC LIMIT 5;

nodes.name: Verify Payment Status
nodes.notes: Read-only payment status (no gateway connection).

parameters.query: SELECT invoice_id, total, due_date, status FROM invoices WHERE customer_id = '{{ $json.customerId }}' ORDER BY due_date DESC LIMIT 10;

nodes.name: Track Invoices
nodes.notes: Invoice tracking lookup.

nodes.name: Select Output Channel
nodes.notes: Delivers the AI reply on the originating channel.

nodes.name: Reply on Telegram
nodes.notes: Send reply via Telegram.

parameters.jsonBody: {"messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "={{ $json.customerId }}", "type": "text", "text": {"body": "{{ $json.output || $json.content }}"}}

nodes.name: Reply on WhatsApp
nodes.notes: Send reply via WhatsApp Cloud API.

parameters.subject: Re: Your request to Orion Support

nodes.name: Reply on Email
nodes.notes: Send reply via SMTP.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Closes the Webhook/CRM event response.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO analytics (request_id, customer_id, channel, category, priority, response_ms, created_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.requestId }}','{{ $json.customerId }}','{{ $json.channel }}','{{ $json.category }}','{{ $json.priority }}', EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - '{{ $json.receivedAt }}'::timestamptz))*1000, NOW());

nodes.name: Log Analytics
nodes.notes: Execution + response-time analytics sink.

parameters.jsCode: const s=$input.first().json; const ms=Math.max(0, Math.round((Date.now()-new Date(s.receivedAt).getTime()))); return [{json:{...s, responseMs:ms, slaMet: ms < 30000}}];

nodes.name: Track Response Time
nodes.notes: Computes end-to-end response time vs SLA.

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Workflow-level failure trigger (set as Error Workflow).

nodes.name: Handle Critical Error
nodes.notes: Aggregates error outputs from critical nodes.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO incidents (incident_time, node, message, severity, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.incidentTime || now() }}','{{ $json.node }}','{{ $json.message }}','{{ $json.severity || 'high' }}','open');

nodes.name: Log Failure
nodes.notes: Persists every failure to the incidents table.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO incident_records (incident_id, payload, created_at) VALUES ('INC-'+extract(epoch from now())::bigint::text,'{{ $json.message }}', NOW()) RETURNING incident_id;

nodes.name: Create Incident Record
nodes.notes: Durable incident record.

nodes.name: Notify Administrator
nodes.notes: Alerts the on-call admin channel.

nodes.name: Payment Reminders Trigger
nodes.notes: Daily-ish cadence for payment reminders.

parameters.subject: Reminder: Invoice {{ $json.invoice_id }} is overdue
parameters.message: Hi {{ $json.name }}, your invoice {{ $json.invoice_id }} ({{ $json.total }}) is {{ $json.status }}. Please complete payment. - Orion Billing

nodes.name: Send Payment Reminders
nodes.notes: Overdue invoice reminder (no gateway).

nodes.name: Initialize Database
nodes.notes: Run once to provision the Orion schema.

nodes.name: Create Database Schema
nodes.notes: Idempotent DDL for all Orion tables.

meta.description: Enterprise AI customer support automation: multi-channel intake, media processing, Claude AI agent, intelligent routing, DB memory, CRM, payments, monitoring and resilient error handling.
